title: /kernel
summary_text: Kernel minimum is restored after replacing the two lanes that hit the `GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark` cap. Live lane manifest: - `implementation-execution` (`Feynman`): execution - code changes and task dispatch - `verification-review` (`James`): verification - regression and correctness review - `risk-guard` (`Wegener`): risk - safety, rollback, and failure-mode checks - `synthesis-council` (`Sagan`): integration - cross-lane synthesis and decision support - `topology-monitor-replacement` (`Pasteur`): monitoring - blocker tracking and orchestration health - `context-explorer-replacement` (`Pascal`): exploration - focused context gathering on dispatch Awaiting task focus.
